project_key.description: The key of the project (e.g. WEBAPP, ENG).

description.description: The description of the issue. Supports Atlassian Document Format (ADF).

issue_type.description: The type of issue (e.g. Bug, Story, Task, Epic).

assignee.description: The account ID of the user to assign the issue to.

labels.description: A list of labels to apply to the issue.

components.description: A list of component names to associate with the issue.

fix_versions.description: A list of fix version names.

parent.description: The key or ID of the parent issue (for subtasks or child stories in an epic).
